revision.text:
[[ja:鹽津神社]] {{Expand Japanese|鹽津神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ishizukuri Shrine (Q11676453) | native_name = 鹽津神社 | image = Isizukuri jinja.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ishizukuri Shrine (Q11676453) | coordinates = {{coord|35.515926|136.168522}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Shiotsuchi|lt=Shiotsuchi|ja|シオツチオジ|zh|鹽土老翁|qid=Q11174872|1=Shiotsuchi-no-Oji}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ishizukuri Shrine'''|鹽津神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|ja|近江国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 54 ** P155: {{ill|Q11469988|ltq=Q11469988|qid=Q11469988|1=Yamatsuteru Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Yutsukino Shrine|lt=Yutsukino Shrine|qid=Q135039823|1=Yutsukino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q844130|ltq=Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} * {{ill|Q843882|ltq=Q843882|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}} * {{ill|Azai District, Ōmi|lt=Azai district|en|Azai District, Ōmi|ja|浅井郡|zh|浅井郡|qid=Q4832118|1=Azai District, Ōmi}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.515926|136.168522}} == image (P18) == * Isizukuri jinja.JPG == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Shiotsuchi|lt=Shiotsuchi|ja|シオツチオジ|zh|鹽土老翁|qid=Q11174872|1=Shiotsuchi-no-Oji}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181834 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q210684|ltq=Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9160005004559 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Shihotsuno Shrine|lt=Shihotsuno Shrine|qid=Q135039822|1=Shihotsuno Shrine (Q135039822)}} ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県長浜市西浅井町塩津浜547', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:鹽津神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11676453}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Shiotsu Shrine |画像=[[File:Isizukuri jinja.JPG|270px|Main sanctuary of Shiotsu Shrine]]
Main sanctuary |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}} Nishiazai-chō Shiotsuhama 547 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|30|57.4|N|136|10|06.6|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title|name=鹽津神社}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Shiotsuchi no Oji|Q11391680|qid=Q11391680|lt=Shiotsuchi no Okina no Kami|1=Hatchō Station}} |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Founding year unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|lt=one-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 18|Q2521|qid=Q2521|1=April 18}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Shiotsu Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Shiotsu Shrine''' ('''Shiozu Shrine''') (しおつじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} enshrined in Nishiazai-chō Shiotsuhama, {{ill|lt=Nagahama|Q844130|qid=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deities === With {{ill|lt=Shiotsuchi no Oji|Q11391680|qid=Q11391680|lt=Shiotsuchi no Okina no Kami|1=Hatchō Station}} as the principal deity, it also enshrines {{ill|lt=Hikohohodemi|Q2310139|qid=Q2310139|lt=Hikohohodemi no Mikoto|1=Petersburg, North Dakota}} and {{ill|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime no Mikoto|1=Toyotama-hime}}. === Shrine crest === * Triple tomoe === History === The founding period is unknown. It is a {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} candidate for "Shiotsu Shrine" listed in the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' (Shikinaisha)Other candidates include {{ill|lt=Katori Shrine (Nagahama)|UNKNOWN|lt=Katori Shrine}} and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Katori Gosha Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, both in the same town.. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|qid=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=1884|Q7819|qid=Q7819|1=1884}} (Meiji 17) it was added as a gōsha. In {{ill|lt=2008|Q2004|qid=Q2004|1=2008}} (Heisei 20), five deity statues were excavated from a shrine site at the nearby {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shiotsuhama Site|1=UNKNOWN}}, and further study has been called for regarding their relationship with this shrine. === Rites === * Annual festival :Held on April 18. === Precinct shrines === * Hachiman Shrine * Kotohira Shrine * Atago Shrine === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1289 塩津神社] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ishizukuri Shrine (Q11676453)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ishizukuri Shrine (Q11676453)]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:長浜市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]]
